svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #1a1a2e;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1a1a2e, #d5d5e6); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#999999, #6a6a6a); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: Two object classes: progression objects (business data and measurement) and proof objects (evidence and lineage)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 248, 225), rgb(30, 24, 4)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(249, 168, 37), rgb(149, 79, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 948px; height: 1px; padding-top: 95px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: All objects share: Immutable (never updated) · Append-only (new versions, old preserved) · Non-replayable (evaluation occurs once) · Feed-forward (no back-reference)

div.div:
Source Object (SO)
Admitted source data from external systems

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 252px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #666;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#666, #000000); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
• Produced at: Admission Boundary
• Governed by: SC + AC + OC
• Cardinality: one Source Object per admitted observation
• Contains: raw field values from source system, contract reference, admission timestamp
• Storage governed by Chapter 17 and current tenant-schema ADRs

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 448px; height: 1px; padding-top: 215px; margin-left: 491px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Canonical Object (CO)
Business-meaning-resolved entity

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 252px; margin-left: 492px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #666;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#666, #000000); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
• Produced at: Canonical Evaluation Boundary
• Governed by: Canonical Contract and Canonical Mapping
• Cardinality: N SOs → 1 CO (primary, D023) · N COs → 1 CO (derived DAG)
• Contains: resolved Business Fields, BO shape, semantic vocabulary
• Storage governed by Chapter 17 and current tenant-schema ADRs

div.div: PROGRESSION OBJECTS · Measurement and Intervention

div.div: Derived from Primary objects. Carry computed measurements and intervention decisions. Never exist without upstream Primary objects.

div.div:
Metric Snapshot (MS)
Computed KPI measurement

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 517px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #666;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#666, #000000); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
• Produced at: Metric Evaluation Boundary
• Governed by: MC (1 per KPI, D024)
• Composition: primary (from COs) or derived (from upstream MSs)
• Contains: metric value, formula result, temporal context, threshold state
• Storage governed by Chapter 17 and current tenant-schema ADRs

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(252, 228, 236), rgb(52, 31, 38)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(229, 115, 115), rgb(194, 96, 96));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 448px; height: 1px; padding-top: 480px; margin-left: 491px;

div.div:
Action Object (AO)
Triggered intervention

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 517px; margin-left: 492px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #666;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#666, #000000); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
• Produced at: Action Evaluation Boundary
• Governed by: IC (Intervention Contract)
• Trigger: threshold/condition from Metric Snapshot
• Contains: intervention type, accountability, outcome assessment
• Storage governed by Chapter 17 and current tenant-schema ADRs

div.div: PROOF OBJECTS · Evidence and Lineage

div.div: Emitted orthogonally at every boundary. Structural property of the execution model, not optional telemetry. If evidence doesn't exist, the boundary didn't occur.

div.div:
Evidence Object
What happened at a boundary

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 782px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #666;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#666, #000000); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
• Inputs referenced, outputs produced, evaluation outcome, timing
• Hash-chained: content_hash → prev_content_hash (tamper detection)
• Storage governed by Chapter 17 and current tenant-schema ADRs

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 240, 240), rgb(31, 31, 31)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(153, 153, 153), rgb(0, 0, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 448px; height: 1px; padding-top: 745px; margin-left: 491px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

div.div:
Lineage Object
How an output traces to its inputs

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 782px; margin-left: 492px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #666;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#666, #000000); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
• Explicit FK-based reference relationships (not reconstructed)
• CO traced from SOs, MS traced from COs, AO traced from MS
• Storage governed by Chapter 17 and current tenant-schema ADRs
